steps.title: Separate the cost parts
steps.content: The total cost includes the first-hour charge, extra-hour charges, and safety gear. Since $x$ is total hours, the number of additional hours is $x-1$.

steps.title: Build the expression
steps.content:
The first hour costs $180$, the additional hours cost $65(x-1)$, and safety gear costs $w$. So:
$$y=180+65(x-1)+w$$
The answer is A.
